title: COT 4601 – Quantum Computing and Quantum Algorithms

text: 3/29/26, 12.24 AM COT 4601 Quantum Computing and Quantum Algorithms University of South Florida COT 4601 Quantum Computing and Quantum Algorithms Credit(s): 3 Introduction to and survey of quantum computing: Theory of qubits and quantum computation are studied including entanglement, superdense coding, quantum teleportation; and current topics Students will also program simulated and real quantum computers_ Prerequisite(s): CDA3103 (min grade B) AND COP 4530 (min grade C-), EGN4450 (min grade C) https Ilcatalog usf edulpreview course_nopop php?catoid-23&coid-104568&print 1/1
